Why Kyaw Kyar

Kyaw Kyar Buy-Back Guarantee

We stand by the vehicles we sell. As a Kyaw Kyar customer, enjoy the peace of mind that comes with a guaranteed market-value buy-back option, ensuring your investment is always protected throughout your ownership journey.

Verified Market Valuation
Seamless Direct Process
Ownership Security

Our valuation criteria

Current Market Valuation

We provide a valuation based on today's accurate market prices, ensuring you receive a transparent and fair offer.

Physical Appraisal

Our experienced team performs a comprehensive review of your vehicle, leveraging our deep knowledge of car specifications to determine a fair, accurate valuation.

Service History Premium

Our experienced team performs a comprehensive review of your vehicle, leveraging our deep knowledge of car specifications to determine a fair, accurate valuation.

How it works

STEP 01

Submit details

Share your car details and photos so we can understand your car clearly.

STEP 02

Market review

We review current market listings, demand, and your car condition to estimate a fair price.

STEP 03

Discuss at our showroom

To help you list your car in our showroom at the market price, our Kyaw Kyar Showroom team is available to discuss the details with customers at any time.

Eligibility & Requirements

Kyaw Kyar Provenance

This benefit is exclusive to vehicles originally purchased from Kyaw Kyar Showrooms.

Vserified Ownership

We require clear documentation to confirm the vehicle’s ownership history from its initial purchase at our showroom.

Legal Clearance

All registration and ownership documents must be clear and up-to-date.

Frequently Asked Questions

Usually within 24–48 hours. We work quickly to give you a price suggestion as soon as possible.

No, this is a standalone buy-back guarantee for your convenience. You can sell without purchasing.

We still offer buy-backs! We simply adjust the market value based on necessary repairs.

Ready to submit your car details?

Continue to the Sell Car page to upload photos and send your information.

Kyaw Kyar

For over 7 years, we've been helping families across Myanmar find their perfect vehicles. With our reliable and thoroughly inspected cars, we are always here for our dear customers whenever you're looking to buy a vehicle.
